metadata.title: Sun Myung Moon & Hak Ja Han Moon — historical events dataset
metadata.description: Geolocated events from the lives and ministry of the founders of the Unification Movement, 1920–2025. Compiled and curated by tplegacy.net.
metadata.attribution: True Parents Legacy archive (tplegacy.net) — CC BY-SA 4.0

location.name: Display name of the site (city, region, or named location).
location.total: Total event count at this location across all decades and types.
location.by_decade: Object: decade (e.g. "1970") -> event count in that decade.
location.by_type: Object: event type key -> event count of that type at this location. Keys defined in eventTypes.

notes.country_general: Entries named '<Country> (general)' aggregate events recorded only at country level in source data.
notes.proclamations: Combines entries marked 'proclamation' and 'declaration' in source.
notes.by_type_subset: by_type may sum to less than total when some events lack a typed category.
